title: Hi, I’m Sarthak!
text:
I’m a knowledge worker operating at the intersection of quantitative methods and behavioural science. My work involves applying this intersection towards better understanding and improving the lives of people in low- and middle-income countries.
As a researcher, I am interested in topics related to computational social science and data science, with a focus on uses in development economics and public policy. I am also interested in open source software and writing about my work and related topics (and non-related ones too).
Beyond work, I enjoy learning new languages, playing video games, combat sports, and quizzing. I’m also a big fan of K-dramas, but my first love is Doctor Who. If you want to talk about mythology, sci-fi, or anything else, feel free to reach out!

title: Welcome!
text: This is my personal website, and my first attempt at website development. I built this using Quarto, which is a great tool for building websites and blogs using markdown. I’m still learning, so if you have any feedback or suggestions, please feel free to reach out!

title: Home
text: This is my personal website where I share insights on data science, programming, and my portfolio projects. Feel free to explore and connect with me!
